name: agent_capability_computer_use_phase148c_multi_app_transfer_visible_terminal
prompt: Run the Phase148C multi_app_transfer controlled visible-terminal benchmark.
prompt_lines: Run the Phase148C multi_app_transfer controlled benchmark. Use only the project terminal command below. It may open only controlled Notepad and controlled local browser targets plus project evidence files. Do not open login pages, payment pages, system settings, registry, installers, password managers, or private user documents.

You must call the terminal tool and run this verification command: $env:PYTHONPATH='..'; $env:LEARNING_AGENT_PHASE150_RUN_REAL_MULTI_APP_TRANSFER='1'; $env:LEARNING_AGENT_PHASE150_ENABLE_REAL_MULTI_APP_TRANSFER='1'; python -c "from learning_agent.computer_use_mcp_v2.windows_runtime.controlled_multi_app_transfer import main; raise SystemExit(main())"

Do not write the final answer early. Only after the terminal command prints PHASE150_CONTROLLED_MULTI_APP_TRANSFER_OK, transfer_text_copied_from_source=true, transferred_text_observed_in_target=true, source_and_target_apps_distinct=true, and real_desktop_touched=true, the final answer's last line must contain: PHASE148C_FRESH_BENCHMARK_READY PHASE148C_FRESH_BENCHMARK_OK family=multi_app_transfer PHASE150_CONTROLLED_MULTI_APP_TRANSFER_OK transfer_text_copied_from_source=true transferred_text_observed_in_target=true source_and_target_apps_distinct=true real_desktop_touched=true real_gui_backing=true
